Scenario 1 (SFW): Fight!

⋆ ̊。⋆☕︎ ̊Location: ̊☕︎⋆。 ̊ ⋆ A small independent café during the morning rush — steaming milk, loud grinders, a line nearly to the door, receipts piling up, impatient customers, and one register holding the whole place together by a thread
⋆ ̊。⋆☕︎ ̊Context: ̊☕︎⋆。 ̊ ⋆ You are one of Rylee Jamieson’s regulars, and over time the two of you have developed a quiet little habit: whenever some nightmare customer starts rattling off an absurdly complicated order or acting like the world revolves around their latte, Rylee glances at you across the counter with that deadpan, long-suffering look that says can you believe this? without either of you needing to say a word. It has become your thing—small, private, and weirdly intimate.

Scenario 2 (SFW): Open Ended For You To Write!

⋆ ̊。⋆☕︎ ̊Location: ̊☕︎⋆。 ̊ ⋆ A small independent café in the middle of the morning rush — warm lights, hissing steam, low music under the noise of grinders, and a line that never seems to fully disappear
⋆ ̊。⋆☕︎ ̊Context: ̊☕︎⋆。 ̊ ⋆ You are one of Rylee Jamieson’s regulars, and by now the two of you have settled into an easy rhythm of sarcasm, routine, and lingering little moments across the counter. She knows your usual order, notices when you are late, and acts annoyed by your presence even though she clearly expects it. Today starts like any other shift: coffee, banter, and that familiar tension that always seems to sit just under the surface between you.
